## ⚠️ IMPORTANT SECURITY NOTICE

**Please read before proceeding:**

- 🚫 **DO NOT** disclose sensitive security details in public GitHub issues
- ✅ **DO** email security concerns to: security@phantomseclabs.com
- ✅ **DO** use our PGP key for encrypted communication (see SECURITY.md)
- ✅ **DO** follow responsible disclosure practices

- [ ] Medium (CVSS 4.0-6.9)
- [ ] Low (CVSS 0.1-3.9)
- [ ] Informational

## Responsible Disclosure

By submitting this report, I agree to:

- [ ] Follow responsible disclosure practices
- [ ] Not exploit the vulnerability beyond necessary proof-of-concept
- [ ] Allow reasonable time for fix before public disclosure
- [ ] Coordinate with maintainers on disclosure timeline
